atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports knee pain following a fall while changing a light bulb

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports the pain is specifically in the inside of his knee

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports the pain is exacerbated by forward bending

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports the pain is exacerbated by twisting the knee

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician prescribes ibuprofen 800 mg every 6 hours as needed for pain

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician prescribes a two-week supply of ibuprofen

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician orders a knee brace and crutches for temporary use

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician recommends ibuprofen 800 mg every 6 hours as needed for pain

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician schedules a follow-up appointment in one week to reassess and consider an MRI if symptoms do not improve

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician has an acute medial meniscus sprain or strain of the right knee
